overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a rainy afternoon in Los Santos. The camera initially follows two female pedestrians along wet sidewalks, then continues independently past apartment buildings, a restaurant with yellow awnings, and a multi-story parking garage. The environment features palm trees, reflective wet pavement, and sparse vehicle traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the camera following two female pedestrians walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk. Palm trees line the street and an apartment building stands to the left. Around 3.5 seconds, the pedestrians turn right and exit the frame, while the camera continues straight along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with stone wall and parking sign

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past apartment buildings and stone retaining walls

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a stone retaining wall on the left and the street on the right. The apartment building facade passes by closely, and a public parking sign becomes visible. Palm trees continue to line the street as the camera moves forward through the rain.

black metal slatted bench facing the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial area featuring a restaurant with prominent yellow awnings. The camera passes yellow public phone booths, a black metal bench, and a trash can positioned along the wet sidewalk. The apartment building recedes into the background as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with multi-story parking garage

events.description: crossing the wet street at intersection while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while observing passing vehicles

covered patio area with tables and umbrellas outside building

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide intersection, crossing the wet street via a marked crosswalk. A large multi-story parking garage dominates the left side of the frame, while vehicles including a black sports car navigate the intersection. The camera passes an outdoor seating area with covered tables as it continues along the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that transitions from a residential street into a busy commercial intersection. It begins by trailing two female pedestrians past palm trees and an apartment building before they turn away, leaving the camera to glide forward along the wet pavement. As the camera moves past a stone retaining wall and public parking signs, the residential facade gives way to a commercial area featuring a restaurant with prominent yellow awnings and matching phone booths. The scene then expands as the camera passes a black metal bench and trash can, moving toward a wide intersection. Finally, the camera crosses a marked crosswalk, passing a large multi-story parking garage and an outdoor seating area while vehicles navigate the reflective, rain-slicked streets.
